verses.2: His offspring will be mighty in the land.
verses.3: Wealth and riches are in his house.
verses.4: Light dawns in the darkness for the upright,
verses.5: It is well with the man who deals graciously and lends.
verses.6: For he will never be shaken.
verses.7: He will not be afraid of evil news.
verses.9: He has dispersed, he has given to the poor.
verses.10: The wicked will see it, and be grieved.
